content.problemStatement:
Given an integer MMM and for an array AAA of length NNN, define


S(i,j)=Ai+Ai+1+…+AjS(i, j) = A_i + A_{i + 1} + \ldots + A_jS(i,j)=Ai​+Ai+1​+…+Aj​ for 1≤i≤j≤N1 \le i \le j \le N1≤i≤j≤N.
T(i,j)=min⁡(S(i,j) mod M,(M−S(i,j)) mod M)T(i, j) = \min(S(i, j) \bmod M, (M - S(i, j)) \bmod M)T(i,j)=min(S(i,j)modM,(M−S(i,j))modM)
f(A,M)=min⁡1≤i≤j≤N(T(i,j))f(A, M) = \displaystyle\min_{1 \le i \le j \le N}(T(i, j))f(A,M)=1≤i≤j≤Nmin​(T(i,j))
For each N=1,2,…,MN = 1, 2, \ldots, MN=1,2,…,M, find the sum of f(A,M)f(A, M)f(A,M) over all MNM^NMN arrays satisfying


0≤Ai<M0 \le A_i < M0≤Ai​<M
∣A∣=N|A| = N∣A∣=N
Since the answers may be large, print them modulo 998244353998244353998244353.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first and only line of input contains a single integer MMM.


Output Format
For each test case, print MMM integers, the sum of f(A,M)f(A, M)f(A,M) over arrays of size NNN for each N=1,2,…,MN = 1, 2, \ldots, MN=1,2,…,M, modulo 998244353998244353998244353.
constraints: The sum of MMM over all test cases does not exceed 2⋅1052 \cdot 10^52⋅105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111 : For N=1N = 1N=1, there is only one array [0][0][0], which has f(A,M)=0f(A, M) = 0f(A,M)=0.
Test case 333 : For N=1N = 1N=1, there are 444 arrays [0][0][0], [1][1][1], [2][2][2] and [3][3][3]. The values of fff are 0,1,2,10, 1, 2, 10,1,2,1 respectively. Thus, the sum is 444.
